name: static.yml
description: GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow that builds the project and deploys static assets to GitHub Pages on pushes to the main branch.
responsibilities: Build the Vite project using Node.js 24
Upload the dist/ artifact for GitHub Pages deployment
Deploy static content to GitHub Pages environment

name: .fallowrc.json
description: Configuration file for Fallow, a dead-code analysis tool. Defines entry points, duplicate detection settings, unused-dependency rules, and export ignore lists for Svelte components.
responsibilities: Define entry points for dead-code analysis
Configure duplicate code detection thresholds
Set rules for unused dependency warnings
Suppress false-positive unused-export warnings for Svelte components and constant exports

name: AGENTS.md
description: Agent context file providing project overview, structure, tech stack, development workflow, and AI agent interaction guidelines for the voxlblade-builder project.
responsibilities: Document project overview and tech stack
Describe project directory structure
List development workflow commands
Provide AI agent interaction guidelines and security rules

name: README.md
description: Default Vite + Svelte + TypeScript project README with IDE setup recommendations, technical considerations, and HMR notes.
responsibilities: Provide IDE setup recommendations (VS Code + Svelte extension)
Explain technical choices (Svelte vs SvelteKit, allowJs, HMR)

name: fallow-output.json
description: Fallow dead-code analysis report containing 28 detected issues across the codebase, including unused files, exports, types, and Svelte component issues.
responsibilities: Report unused files, exports, and types
Report unused Svelte events and component issues
Provide file-level and line-level issue details

name: fallow-security.json
description: Fallow security analysis report containing tainted-sink and dangerous-HTML findings across Svelte components, with CWE references and severity levels.
responsibilities: Report tainted-sink security findings (CWE 79, XSS risks)
Report dangerous-HTML injection risks in template.innerHTML usage
Provide file, line, and severity details for each finding

name: index.html
description: Root HTML entry point for the Vite SPA. Provides the #app mount point and loads src/main.ts as a module script.
responsibilities: Serve as the HTML shell for the single-page application
Mount the Svelte app via the #app div
Load the TypeScript entry point

name: package.json
description: Project manifest defining the voxlblade package with dev/build/check scripts, Svelte 5 + Vite 8 dev dependencies, and Vercel Analytics as a production dependency.
responsibilities: Define project name, version, and module type
Declare dev/build/preview/check npm scripts
List devDependencies (Svelte, Vite, TypeScript, ESLint, Playwright, Fallow)
List production dependencies (@vercel/analytics)

name: ts-errors.txt
description: Empty file, likely used as a scratchpad or output target for TypeScript compiler error logs.
responsibilities: Serve as output target for TypeScript type-check errors

name: tsconfig.app.json
description: TypeScript configuration for the application source code. Extends @tsconfig/svelte, targets ES2023, enables JS checking in .svelte and .js files, and includes all src/ TypeScript, JS, and Svelte files.
responsibilities: Define TypeScript compiler options for app source code
Enable type-checking in .svelte and .js files
Include all src/ files for compilation

name: tsconfig.json
description: Root TypeScript configuration that delegates to tsconfig.app.json via extends.
responsibilities: Provide a root tsconfig that inherits app settings

name: tsconfig.node.json
description: TypeScript configuration for Node.js tooling files (e.g., vite.config.ts). Targets ES2023, uses bundler module resolution, enables strict linting options, and only includes vite.config.ts.
responsibilities: Define TypeScript compiler options for build tooling files
Enable strict linting (noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters)
Include only vite.config.ts for compilation

name: vercel.json
description: Vercel deployment configuration specifying the Vite build command, dist output directory, and cache-control headers for static assets, service worker, and index.html.
responsibilities: Configure Vercel build command and output directory
Set immutable caching for hashed assets in /assets/
Set must-revalidate caching for service worker and index.html

name: armors.json
description: Game data defining all armor sets in Voxel Blade. Each armor set has a name, shared stats (defense, elemental boosts, resistances), a perk, and multiple part types (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings).
responsibilities: Define armor set names and descriptions
Define stat bonuses per armor set (defense, elemental boosts, resistances, tenacity, protection, warding)
Define armor perks and their stack amounts
Define part types per set (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings)

name: blades.json
description: Game data defining all weapon blade parts in Voxel Blade. Each blade has a tier (1-5), attack speed, damage type distribution, stat scaling values, optional perks, and a blade type category (Small/Medium/Heavy Blade, Hammer Head).
responsibilities: Define blade names and tiers
Define attack speed and damage type weights per blade
Define stat scaling factors (physical, magic, elemental, dexterity)
Define blade type classification and associated perks

name: enchantments.json
description: Game data defining all weapon enchantments in Voxel Blade. Enchantments are split into unAscended and Ascended categories, each with stat modifiers (multipliers/additions), special effects, and stacking rules.
responsibilities: Define enchantment names and categories (unAscended/Ascended)
Define stat modification formulas (multiplier and addition types)
Define special effects (Lifesteal, Perfection, Wildfire, etc.)
Define stacking rules (exclusive vs multi) and acquisition notes

name: essences.json
description: Game data defining all essence items in Voxel Blade. Essences mirror blade/handle stats and perks across tiers 1-5, serving as a weapon crafting or upgrade component system.
responsibilities: Define essence names and tiers
Define attack speed and stat scaling per essence
Define perks granted by each essence
Define essence type classification

name: gloves.json
description: Game data defining all glove and shield equipment in Voxel Blade. Each glove has a tier, attack speed, stat bonuses, multiple perks (including spirit perks), and a glove type (Gloves or Shield).
responsibilities: Define glove names, tiers, and types (Gloves/Shield)
Define stat bonuses per glove
Define perks including creature spirit perks
Define attack speed modifiers

name: guilds.json
description: Game data defining all guild classes in Voxel Blade. Each guild has a name and 3 ranks, with escalating stat bonuses and perk stack amounts per rank.
responsibilities: Define guild names (Gladiator, Cursed, Cleric, Scholar, Knight, Thief, Draconic, Monk, Vampire)
Define rank-based stat scaling per guild
Define perks granted at each guild rank
Define rank progression (1-3)

name: handles.json
description: Game data defining all weapon handle parts in Voxel Blade. Each handle has a tier (1-5), attack speed, stat scaling, optional perks, and a handle type (Medium, Long, Pole).
responsibilities: Define handle names and tiers
Define attack speed and stat scaling per handle
Define perks granted by each handle
Define handle type classification (Medium Handle, Long Handle, Pole)

name: perks.json
description: Game data defining all perks in Voxel Blade. This is the largest data file (3688 lines), containing every perk with its name, description, and categorization tags (Offensive, Defensive, Weapon, Armor, etc.).
responsibilities: Define all perk names and descriptions
Tag each perk with categories (Offensive, Defensive, Buff, Debuff, Weapon, Armor, Rune, etc.)
Serve as the master reference for perk effects used across blades, handles, armor, gloves, rings, runes, and guilds

name: races.json
description: Game data defining all playable races in Voxel Blade. Each race has a name, passive ability description, and optional stat/cooldown modifiers that grant unique gameplay bonuses.
responsibilities: Define race names and passive ability descriptions
Define stat modifiers per race (warding, protection, tenacity, etc.)
Define cooldown modifiers per race (rune CDR, weapon art CDR)
Define special modifiers (armor penetration, jump boost)

name: rings.json
description: Game data defining all ring accessories in Voxel Blade. Each ring has a name, description, stat bonuses, and a single perk with its stack amount.
responsibilities: Define ring names and flavor text descriptions
Define stat bonuses per ring
Define perks granted by each ring

name: runes.json
description: Game data defining all rune abilities in Voxel Blade. Each rune has a name, description, cooldown, stat bonuses, and optional perks. Runes provide active abilities like fireballs, mounts, summons, and buffs.
responsibilities: Define rune names and ability descriptions
Define cooldown values per rune
Define stat bonuses per rune
Define optional perks granted by runes
